---
title: ""
format: html
---

<div class="home-container">

<div class="left-column">

<img src="images/profile.jpg" class="profile-pic">

<div class="profile-info">

### James N. Hernandez

M.S. Data Science  
University of Minnesota

</div>

<div class="connect-section">

<div class="email-text" id="email-copy">
hern0473@umn.edu
</div>

<div class="social-buttons">

<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=hern0473@umn.edu"
   class="contact-btn"
   target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jameshernandez2003/"
   class="contact-btn"
   target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/jamnandez"
   class="contact-btn"
   target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
</a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="copy-toast" id="copy-toast">Copied!</div>


</div>
<div class="divider"></div>

<div class="right-column">

## Biography

I am a Master's student in Data Science at the University of Minnesota with a minor in biostatistics.

## Skills

**Programming:** R, Python, SQL, Java

**Statistics:** Regression, Causal Inference, Mixed Models, MLE, Hypothesis Testing, Resampling Methods

**Machine Learning:** Classification, Ensemble Methods, Neural Networks, SVM, LASSO & Regularization, Model Evaluation & Tuning

**Packages:** tidyverse, ggplot2, lme4, Quarto, scikit-learn, PyTorch, pandas

**Tools:** Quarto, Git, LaTeX, Shiny, QGIS, MIMIC-IV

## Research Interests

- Biostatistics & Epidemiological Methods
- Infectious Disease Modeling
- Clinical Machine Learning
- Causal Inference
- Public Health Analytics
- Health Equity & Social Determinants
- Sustainability & Development
- Social Science


</div>



</div>
